titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 577

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=896 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:12:05.544527+00 | translation moa=897 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:12:05.554094+00

p.cl:
. M . Rex . Scott’ . priori de Collingham et toti Conuentui loci eiusdem
et omnibus probis hominibus tocius terre sue Salutem .

Sciatis me concessisse et firmiter
precepisse ut prior et monachi de collingham secundum uoluntatem sua adducant suos pro
prios homines ubicumque maneant in terra sua  ad herbergandum uillam de
Collingham . et prohibeo super meam plenariam foris facturam ut nemo eos super
negotio predicto disturbet .

Testibus . Waltero Cancellario . hereberto Camerario . Ricardo Capel
lano . Nicolao clerico .
Malcolm, king of the Scots, to the prior of Coldingham and the whole community of that same place, and to all worthy men of his entire land, greeting.

Know me to have allowed and resolutely instructed that the prior and monks of Coldingham may employ their own men according to their will, wherever they abide within their land, for the building of the toun of Coldingham, and I forbid on pain of my full forfeiture that anyone disturb them in respect of the said business.
As witnesses: Walter the chancellor, Herbert the chamberlain, Richard the chaplain, Nicholas the clerk.
